description: A portrait-format recruitment graphic. A photograph shows a blindfolded statue of Lady Justice holding scales and a sword, lit by sunbeams in a hall. The Department of Homeland Security seal and U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement wordmark sit at the top. Large white text across the lower portion reads Not a career. A calling.
notable_text: U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement; Not a career. A calling.
